prompt: Review the current prompts.md (believed clean when the eval was drafted; it turned out to contain a real factual error, which both runs discovered).

assertions.text: Identifies the template-variable namespace error: prompt templates read {{ input.* }}, not {{ variables.* }} as the page documents
Identifies that the documented prompt TOML shape is wrong (template text belongs on a [[configs]] entry as userPromptTemplate; [prompt] uses displayName, and has no body field)
Verifies claims against actual source rather than asserting from intuition (cites files/paths as evidence)
Does not pad the review with manufactured findings beyond the real ones (at most ~5 minor/low suggestions)
States explicitly that the rest of the page conforms / is clean
